Enconsta Leadership

S. Vishwanathan

Head of Process & Technical Safety

Biography

Expert in HAZOP, SIL assessment, and refinery debottlenecking. Coordinates high-performance process simulations and active fire protection designs.

Key Expertise

  • HAZOP/SIL
  • Debottlenecking
  • Flare Network Analysis
  • Safety Standards

Professional Experience

22+ Years in Process Plant Engineering
